title: About VetCare - Our Story & Mission
description: Learn about our passionate team and commitment to pet wellness

value.heading: About *Us*
value.subheading: Founded on a passion for pet wellness and care excellence

value.heading: Our *Mission*
value.body: We believe every pet deserves exceptional care. Our team is dedicated to providing the highest quality services in a safe, welcoming environment.

value.heading: Ready to *Experience* VetCare?
value.body: Schedule a tour of our facilities or book your pet's first appointment today.
